Sequestration Order for Fiscal Year 2025 Pursuant to Section 251A of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act, as AmendedOrder of President of the United States, dated , 89 F.R. 18531, provided:Mar. 11, 2024By the authority vested in me as President by the laws of the United States of America, and in accordance with section 251A of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act (the “Act”), as amended, , I hereby order that, on , direct spending budgetary resources for fiscal year 2025 in each non-exempt budget account be reduced by the amount calculated by the Office of Management and Budget in its report to the Congress of .2 U.S.C. 901aOctober 1, 2024March 11, 2024All sequestrations shall be made in strict accordance with the requirements of section 251A of the Act and the specifications of the Office of Management and Budget’s report of , prepared pursuant to section 251A(9) of the Act.March 11, 2024Sequestration orders pursuant to this section for prior fiscal Act (the “Act”), as amended, , I hereby order that, on , direct spending budgetary resources for fiscal year 2025 in each non-exempt budget account be reduced by the amount calculated by the Office of children.label: B
children.text: subtracting the amount of deficit reduction achieved by the enactment of a joint committee bill, as provided in section 401(b)(3)(B)(i)(II) of the Budget Control Act of 2011;

children.label: C
children.text: reducing the difference by 18 percent to account for debt service;

children.label: D
children.text: dividing the result by 9; and

children.label: E
children.text: for fiscal year 2013, reducing the amount calculated under subparagraphs (A) through (D) by $24,000,000,000.

children.heading: Allocation to functions
children.label: 2 Allocation to functions
children.text: On , for fiscal year 2013, and in its sequestration preview report for fiscal years 2014 through 2021 pursuant to , OMB shall allocate half of the total reduction calculated pursuant to paragraph (1) for that year to discretionary appropriations and direct spending accounts within function 050 (defense function) and half to accounts in all other functions (nondefense functions).March 1, 2013section 904(c) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: taking the total reduction for the defense function allocated for that year under paragraph (2);

children.label: ii
children.text: multiplying by the discretionary spending limit for the revised security category for that year; and

children.label: iii
children.text: dividing by the sum of the discretionary spending limit for the security category and OMB’s baseline estimate of nonexempt outlays for direct spending programs within the defense function for that year.

children.heading: Direct spending
children.label: B Direct spending
children.text: OMB shall calculate the reduction to direct spending by taking the total reduction for the defense function required for that year under paragraph (2) and subtracting the discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to subparagraph (A).

children.label: i
children.text: taking the total reduction for nondefense functions allocated for that year under paragraph (2);

children.label: ii
children.text: multiplying by the discretionary spending limit for the revised nonsecurity category for that year; and

children.label: iii
children.text: dividing by the sum of the discretionary spending limit for the revised nonsecurity category and OMB’s baseline estimate of nonexempt outlays for direct spending programs in nondefense functions for that year.

children.heading: Direct spending
children.label: B Direct spending
children.text: OMB shall calculate the reduction to direct spending programs by taking the total reduction for nondefense functions required for that year under paragraph (2) and subtracting the discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to subparagraph (A).

children.label: i
children.text: for the revised security category, an amount equal to the defense function discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to paragraph (3); and

children.label: ii
children.text: for the revised nonsecurity category, an amount equal to the nondefense function discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to paragraph (4).

children.label: i
children.text: for the revised security category by the amount of the defense function discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to paragraph (3); and

children.label: ii
children.text: for the revised nonsecurity category by the amount of the nondefense function discretionary reduction calculated pursuant to paragraph (4).

children.label: A
children.text: On the date specified in paragraph (2) during each applicable year, OMB shall prepare and the President shall order a sequestration, effective upon issuance, of nonexempt direct spending to achieve the direct spending reduction calculated pursuant to paragraphs (3) and (4). When implementing the sequestration of direct spending pursuant to this paragraph, OMB shall follow the procedures specified in , the exemptions specified in , and the special rules specified in , except that the percentage reduction for the Medicare programs specified in shall not be more than 2 percent for a fiscal year.section 935 of this titlesection 905 of this titlesection 906 of this titlesection 906(d) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for the defense function is the same percent as the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for the defense function for fiscal year 2021 calculated under paragraph (3)(B); and

children.label: ii
children.text: the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for nondefense functions is the same percent as the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for nondefense functions for fiscal year 2021 calculated under paragraph (4)(B).

children.label: C
children.text: Notwithstanding the 2 percent limit specified in subparagraph (A) for payments for the Medicare programs specified in , the sequestration order of the President under such subparagraph for fiscal year 2022 shall be applied to such payments so that with respect to the period beginning on , and ending on , the payment reduction shall be 1.0 percent.section 906(d) of this titleApril 1, 2022June 30, 2022

children.label: D
children.text: On the date on which the President submits the budget under for fiscal year 2032, the President shall order a sequestration of payments for the Medicare programs specified in , effective upon issuance, such that the payment reduction shall be 2.0 percent for such fiscal year.section 1105 of title 31section 906(d) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for the defense function is 4.0 percent; and

children.label: ii
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (D), the percentage reduction for nonexempt direct spending for nondefense functions is 2.8 percent.

children.label: i
children.text: with respect to the first 5 months in which such order is effective for such fiscal year, the payment reduction shall be 2.0 percent; and

children.label: ii
children.text: with respect to the last 7 months in which such order is effective for such fiscal year, the payment reduction shall be 0 percent.

children.heading: Adjustment for Medicare
children.label: 7 Adjustment for Medicare
children.text: If the percentage reduction for the Medicare programs would exceed 2 percent for a fiscal year in the absence of paragraph (6), OMB shall increase the reduction for all other discretionary appropriations and direct spending under paragraph (4) by a uniform percentage to a level sufficient to achieve the reduction required by paragraph (4) in the non-defense function.

children.heading: Implementation of reductions
children.label: 8 Implementation of reductions
children.text: Any reductions imposed under this section shall be implemented in accordance with .section 906(k) of this title

children.heading: Report
children.label: 9 Report
children.text: On the dates specified in paragraph (2), OMB shall submit a report to Congress containing information about the calculations required under this section, the adjusted discretionary spending limits, a listing of the reductions required for each nonexempt direct spending account, and any other data and explanations that enhance public understanding of this title and actions taken under it.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2014 and 2015
children.label: 10 Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2014 and 2015
A
children.text: OMB shall make the calculations necessary to implement the direct spending reductions calculated pursuant to paragraphs (3) and (4) without regard to the amendment made to revising the discretionary spending limits for fiscal years 2014 and 2015 by the Bipartisan Budget Act of 2013.section 901(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (5)(B) shall not be implemented for fiscal years 2014 and 2015.

children.heading: Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2016 and 2017
children.label: 11 Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2016 and 2017
A
children.text: OMB shall make the calculations necessary to implement the direct spending reductions calculated pursuant to paragraphs (3) and (4) without regard to the amendment made to revising the discretionary spending limits for fiscal years 2016 and 2017 by the Bipartisan Budget Act of 2015.section 901(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (5)(B) shall not be implemented for fiscal years 2016 and 2017.

children.heading: Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2018 and 2019
children.label: 12 Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2018 and 2019
A
children.text: OMB shall make the calculations necessary to implement the direct spending reductions calculated pursuant to paragraphs (3) and (4) without regard to the amendment made to revising the discretionary spending limits for fiscal years 2018 and 2019 by the Bipartisan Budget Act of 2018.section 901(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (5)(B) shall not be implemented for fiscal years 2018 and 2019.

children.heading: Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2020 and 2021
children.label: 13 Implementing direct spending reductions for fiscal years 2020 and 2021
A
children.text: OMB shall make the calculations necessary to implement the direct spending reductions calculated pursuant to paragraphs (3) and (4) without regard to the amendment made to revising the discretionary spending limits for fiscal years 2020 and 2021 by the Bipartisan Budget Act of 2019.section 901(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (5)(B) shall not be implemented for fiscal years 2020 and 2021.
